description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Project that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have multiple jobs to build the project on different platforms: ubuntu_x11 (with x86_64 and aarch64 architectures), ubuntu_wayland (with x86_64 and aarch64 architectures), macosx, windows (64 bit), and windows_x86 (32 bit). Each job should check out the repository, install required dependencies, build the project, and upload the resulting artifacts to an FTP server using credentials from secrets.
